docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY VIRDEN, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT ROSENBAUM, ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-20-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST FOR CONT. FROM DEFT ROBERT ROSENBAUM RECEIVED AND ENTERED. FEES SUBMITTED. RETURNED WITH SCF18. NOTICE TO OTHER SIDE IS NEEDED.
